synopsis:
Issue 4 of 6 from Marvel Comics Obi-Wan Kenobi adaptation miniseries. This issue is an adaptation of the fourth episode of the television series Obi-Wan Kenobi.
OBI-WAN PLOTS A DARING MISSION INTO ENEMY TERRITORY!
OBI-WAN and TALA must evade the INQUISITORS to rescue LEIA! Meanwhile, THIRD SISTER and the other INQUISITORS try to impress DARTH VADER by being the one to finally capture OBI-WAN!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #4
